author: y4rr
content: Decision: Writing 3 new PTX kernels: (1) gelu_tanh_kernel for forward tanh approx — formula: 0.5*x*(1+tanh(sqrt(2/pi)*(x+0.044715*x^3))), (2) gelu_erf_kernel for forward exact erf — formula: x*0.5*(1+erf(x/sqrt(2))) using A&S 7.1.26, (3) gelu_backward_tanh_kernel for #465 — derivative of the tanh approx. Following existing PTX patterns: sm_52, ex2.approx for exp, rcp.approx for division.
